description_long: This is a classic claw hammer featuring a robust, dark metallic head and a long, cylindrical wooden handle. The head has two distinct parts: a flat, circular striking face for driving nails and a curved, bifurcated claw for prying and removing nails. The wooden handle shows a natural grain pattern and a slightly weathered appearance, suggesting frequent use. The metal head is matte black, with the claw section smoothly curving away from the handle. There are no visible brand markings or logos on either the handle or the head. The hammer's overall design is utilitarian, making it suitable for a variety of construction or repair tasks in urban environments.
description: A traditional claw hammer with a dark metal head and a long, weathered wooden handle. The head features a flat striking face and a curved claw for nail removal.
description_view_0: Side view highlighting the curved claw and the transition from the wooden handle to the metal head.
description_view_1: Profile view showing the full length of the handle and the flat striking face of the hammer head.
description_view_2: Angled view from the handle end, emphasizing the length of the handle and the bifurcated claw.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the handle's grain and the side profile of the hammer head.
attribute_handle_type: wooden straight handle with a natural grain, slightly weathered and smooth, no additional grip enhancements visible
attribute_head_type: claw hammer head with a flat striking face and a curved, bifurcated claw for nail removal, made of dark steel
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: minor wear visible on the handle, slight discoloration and surface marks, but no major damage
